title: 5 hurt when US military plane hits barrier on takeoff in Philippines
author: Ellen Mitchell
fullText: U.S. service members were injured in a military aircraft training accident Tuesday in the Philippines, the Defense Department has confirmed. Philippine officials initially said Wednesday that an Air Force plane carrying five American personnel hit a concrete barrier while attempting to take off from a road during contingency training north of Manila, injuring all those…
